summary: package eu.kalafatic.utils.providers; import java.util.HashMap; import java.util.Iterator; import java.util.Map; import org.eclipse.swt.graphics.Color; import org.eclipse.swt.graphics.RGB; import org.eclipse.swt.widgets.Display; @SuppressWarnings({ "rawtypes", "unchecked" }) public class ColorManager { private Map fColorTable = new HashMap(10); public void dispose() { Iterator e = fColorTable.values().iterator(); while (e.hasNext()) { ((Color) e.next()).dispose(); } }
